overview: A modern, interactive crime analytics visualization dashboard built for a final year project review at SVCE. Showcases CNN-based violence detection using AlexNet, LeNet, and VGG models with live crime heatmaps, KPI metrics, model performance comparisons, system architecture pipeline, and a live detection simulation (Sentinel View) — all with a dark blue/gold theme and glassmorphism design.
features: Crime analytics dashboard with KPI cards and interactive charts
Crime type distribution and monthly trend line charts
Hour × day heatmap for crime intensity
CNN model accuracy comparison (AlexNet, LeNet, VGG)
Live detection simulation (Sentinel View) with alert log
Risk zones table for Chennai districts
Dark glassmorphism UI with blue/gold accents
